candidate_definition_hints.text: Community guide to securing and improving privacy on macOS.

This guide is a collection of techniques for improving the security and privacy of [Apple silicon](https://support.apple.com/116943) Mac computers running a [currently supported](https://support.apple.com/HT201222) version of macOS. **Using Macs with Intel CPUs leaves you open t…
